title: CypherX API Key Resource ACL Row (Contract 18)
description: One row of the per-service <service>.api_key_acls table. Pins a single (api_key_id, resource_type, resource_id) → permissions grant. resource_type and permissions values are service-specific (see api-key-format.md cross-service summary). PRIMARY KEY is (api_key_id, resource_type, resource_id). This is a stored-row shape, so additionalProperties:false is enforced.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant UUID (Contract 13). Enforced by row-level security policy p_api_key_acls_tenant.

resource_type.description: Service-specific resource class, e.g. kb, model, policy, agent, tool, skill, memory_scope. See api-key-format.md for the per-service table.

resource_id.description: Concrete resource identifier, or "*" meaning all resources of that type within the tenant.

permissions.description: Service-specific permission verbs, e.g. read, write, invoke, admin, ingest, query, simulate, forget, publish, deprecate, submit, cancel. See api-key-format.md for the per-service table.
